'''yanuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:encasement|encasement]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-n-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:encasement|encasement]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yanuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yænichith|yænichith]] || [[word:yænichij|yænichij]] || [[word:yænichish|yænichish]] || [[word:yænichi|yænichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yanunuchuth|yanunuchuth]] || [[word:yanunuchuj|yanunuchuj]] || [[word:yanunuchush|yanunuchush]] || [[word:yanunuchu|yanunuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yanuchuth|yanuchuth]] || [[word:yanuchuj|yanuchuj]] || [[word:yanuchush|yanuchush]] || [[word:yanuchu|yanuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yanufchufth|yanufchufth]] || [[word:yanufchufj|yanufchufj]] || [[word:yanufchufsh|yanufchufsh]] || [[word:yanufchuf|yanufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yanuchuthu|yanuchuthu]] || [[word:yanuchuju|yanuchuju]] || [[word:yanuchushu|yanuchushu]] || [[word:yanuchuku|yanuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yanuchuth|yanuchuth]] || [[word:yanuchuj|yanuchuj]] || [[word:yanuchush|yanuchush]] || [[word:yanuchu|yanuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yanuchuthul|yanuchuthul]] || [[word:yanuchujul|yanuchujul]] || [[word:yanuchushul|yanuchushul]] || [[word:yanuchukul|yanuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yanuchuuthuthu|yanuchuuthuthu]] || [[word:yanuchuujuju|yanuchuujuju]] || [[word:yanuchuushushu|yanuchuushushu]] || [[word:yanuchuuku|yanuchuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yanuchuthun|yanuchuthun]] || [[word:yanuchujun|yanuchujun]] || [[word:yanuchushun|yanuchushun]] || [[word:yanuchukun|yanuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yanuchuthuoro|yanuchuthuoro]] || [[word:yanuchujuoro|yanuchujuoro]] || [[word:yanuchushuoro|yanuchushuoro]] || [[word:yanuchukuoro|yanuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
